query_analysis.query: how much does Bakery cost Singapore
competitors_mentioned: Rental:** SGD 3,000 to SGD 15,000+ per month depending on location and size.
Equipment:** SGD 20,000 to SGD 100,000+ for ovens, mixers, display cases.
Licenses & Permits:** SGD 300 to SGD 1,000 for food shop licenses.
Ingredients & Supplies:** Ongoing costs depending on volume.
Staff:** SGD 1,500 to SGD 3,000+ per staff monthly.
**Quality and Freshness** – Look for bakeries known for fresh, high-quality ingredients and daily-baked goods.
**Variety** – Choose a bakery that offers a range of products you like, such as bread, cakes, pastries, or local treats.
**Reviews and Reputation** – Check online reviews on platforms like Google, Facebook, or food blogs to gauge customer satisfaction.
**Specialty** – Some bakeries specialize in artisanal bread, custom cakes, or traditional Singaporean pastries—pick one that fits your needs.
**Location and Convenience** – Consider proximity and delivery options if needed.

recommended_actions.title: Improve brand visibility in AI answers
recommended_actions.why_it_matters: If the brand is not being surfaced in answer engines, competitors are more likely to be recommended first.
recommended_actions.recommended_fix: Prioritize direct-answer pages, comparison pages, and FAQ-led content for missed commercial and recommendation-style queries.
recommended_actions.support_signal: Low visibility score across the latest audit.
